maybe_merged_per_route_config->grpcService().value();\\n324:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz filter: using per-route gRPC service configuration.\\\",\\n325:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n326: \\n327:       // Create a new gRPC client for this route.\\n328:       auto per_route_client = createPerRouteGrpcClient(grpc_service);\\n329:       if (per_route_client != nullptr) {\\n330:         client_ = std::move(per_route_client);\\n331:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz filter: successfully created per-route gRPC client.\\\",\\n332:                          *decoder_callbacks_);\\n333:       } else {\\n334:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n335:             warn,\\n336:             \\\"ext_authz filter: failed to create per-route gRPC client, falling back to default.\\\",\\n337:             *decoder_callbacks_);\\n338:       }\\n339:     } else if (maybe_merged_per_route_config->httpService().has_value()) {\\n340:       const auto& http_service = maybe_merged_per_route_config->httpService().value();\\n341:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz filter: using per-route HTTP service configuration.\\\",\\n342:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n343: \\n344:       // Create a new HTTP client for this route.\\n345:       auto per_route_client = createPerRouteHttpClient(http_service);\\n346:       if (per_route_client != nullptr) {\\n347:         client_ = std::move(per_route_client);\\n348:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz filter: successfully created per-route HTTP client.\\\",\\n349:                          *decoder_callbacks_);\\n350:       } else {\\n351:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n352:             warn,\\n353:             \\\"ext_authz filter: failed to create per-route HTTP client, falling back to default.\\\",\\n354:             *decoder_callbacks_);\\n355:       }\\n356:     }\\n357:   }\\n358: \\n359:   // If metadata_context_namespaces or typed_metadata_context_namespaces is specified,\\n360:   // pass matching filter metadata to the ext_authz service.\\n361:   // If metadata key is set in both the connection and request metadata,\\n362:   // then the value will be the request metadata value.\\n363:   envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata metadata_context;\\n364:   fillMetadataContext({&decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().dynamicMetadata(),\\n365:                        &decoder_callbacks_->connection()->streamInfo().dynamicMetadata()},\\n366:                       config_->metadataContextNamespaces(),\\n367:                       config_->typedMetadataContextNamespaces(), metadata_context);\\n368: \\n369:   // Fill route_metadata_context from the selected route's metadata.\\n370:   envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata route_metadata_context;\\n371:   if (decoder_callbacks_->route() != nullptr) {\\n372:     fillMetadataContext({&decoder_callbacks_->route()->metadata()},\\n373:                         config_->routeMetadataContextNamespaces(),\\n374:                         config_->routeTypedMetadataContextNamespaces(), route_metadata_context);\\n375:   }\\n376: \\n377:   Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckRequestUtils::createHttpCheck(\\n378:       decoder_callbacks_, headers, std::move(context_extensions), std::move(metadata_context),\\n379:       std::move(route_metadata_context), check_request_, max_request_bytes_, config_->packAsBytes(),\\n380:       config_->headersAsBytes(), config_->includePeerCertificate(), config_->includeTLSSession(),\\n381:       config_->destinationLabels(), config_->allowedHeadersMatcher(),\\n382:       config_->disallowedHeadersMatcher());\\n383: \\n384:   ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter calling authorization server.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_);\\n385:   // Store start time of ext_authz filter call\\n386:   start_time_ = decoder_callbacks_->dispatcher().timeSource().monotonicTime();\\n387: \\n388:   state_ = State::Calling;\\n389:   filter_return_ = FilterReturn::StopDecoding; // Don't let the filter chain continue as we are\\n390:                                                // going to invoke check call.\\n391:   cluster_ = decoder_callbacks_->clusterInfo();\\n392:   initiating_call_ = true;\\n393:   client_->check(*this, check_request_, decoder_callbacks_->activeSpan(),\\n394:                  decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo());\\n395:   initiating_call_ = false;\\n396: }\\n397: \\n398: Http::FilterHeadersStatus Filter::decodeHeaders(Http::RequestHeaderMap& headers, bool end_stream) {\\n399:   Router::RouteConstSharedPtr route = decoder_callbacks_->route();\\n400:   const auto per_route_flags = getPerRouteFlags(route);\\n401:   skip_check_ = per_route_flags.skip_check_;\\n402:   if (skip_check_) {\\n403:     return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::Continue;\\n404:   }\\n405: \\n406:   if (!config_->filterEnabled(decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().dynamicMetadata())) {\\n407:     stats_.disabled_.inc();\\n408:     if (config_->denyAtDisable()) {\\n409:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter is disabled. Deny the request.\\\",\\n410:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n411:       decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().setResponseFlag(\\n412:           StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UnauthorizedExternalService);\\n413:       decoder_callbacks_->sendLocalReply(\\n414:           config_->statusOnError(), EMPTY_STRING, nullptr, absl::nullopt,\\n415:           Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponseCodeDetails::get().AuthzError);\\n416:       return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::StopIteration;\\n417:     }\\n418:     return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::Continue;\\n419:   }\\n420: \\n421:   request_headers_ = &headers;\\n422:   const auto& check_settings = per_route_flags.check_settings_;\\n423:   buffer_data_ = (config_->withRequestBody() || check_settings.has_with_request_body()) &&\\n424:                  !check_settings.disable_request_body_buffering() &&\\n425:                  !(end_stream || Http::Utility::isWebSocketUpgradeRequest(headers) ||\\n426:                    Http::Utility::isH2UpgradeRequest(headers));\\n427: \\n428:   max_request_bytes_ = config_->maxRequestBytes();\\n429:   if (buffer_data_) {\\n430:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz filter is buffering the request\\\", *decoder_callbacks_);\\n431: \\n432:     allow_partial_message_ = check_settings.has_with_request_body()\\n433:                                  ? check_settings.with_request_body().allow_partial_message()\\n434:                                  : config_->allowPartialMessage();\\n435:     if (check_settings.has_with_request_body()) {\\n436:       max_request_bytes_ = check_settings.with_request_body().max_request_bytes();\\n437:     }\\n438:     if (!allow_partial_message_) {\\n439:       decoder_callbacks_->setBufferLimit(max_request_bytes_);\\n440:     }\\n441:     return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::StopIteration;\\n442:   }\\n443: \\n444:   // Initiate a call to the authorization server since we are not disabled.\\n445:   initiateCall(headers);\\n446:   return filter_return_ == FilterReturn::StopDecoding\\n447:              ? Http::FilterHeadersStatus::StopAllIterationAndWatermark\\n448:              : Http::FilterHeadersStatus::Continue;\\n449: }\\n450: \\n451: Http::FilterDataStatus Filter::decodeData(Buffer::Instance& data, bool end_stream) {\\n452:   if (buffer_data_ && !skip_check_) {\\n453:     const bool buffer_is_full = isBufferFull(data.length());\\n454:     if (end_stream || buffer_is_full) {\\n455:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz filter finished buffering the request since {}\\\",\\n456:                        *decoder_callbacks_, buffer_is_full ? \\\"buffer is full\\\" : \\\"stream is ended\\\");\\n457:       // Make sure data is available in initiateCall.\\n458:       decoder_callbacks_->addDecodedData(data, true);\\n459:       initiateCall(*request_headers_);\\n460:       return filter_return_ == FilterReturn::StopDecoding\\n461:                  ? Http::FilterDataStatus::StopIterationAndWatermark\\n462:                  : Http::FilterDataStatus::Continue;\\n463:     } else {\\n464:       return Http::FilterDataStatus::StopIterationAndBuffer;\\n465:     }\\n466:   }\\n467: \\n468:   return Http::FilterDataStatus::Continue;\\n469: }\\n470: \\n471: Http::FilterTrailersStatus Filter::decodeTrailers(Http::RequestTrailerMap&) {\\n472:   if (buffer_data_ && !skip_check_) {\\n473:     if (filter_return_ != FilterReturn::StopDecoding) {\\n474:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz filter finished buffering the request\\\",\\n475:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n476:       initiateCall(*request_headers_);\\n477:     }\\n478:     return filter_return_ == FilterReturn::StopDecoding ? Http::FilterTrailersStatus::StopIteration\\n479:                                                         : Http::FilterTrailersStatus::Continue;\\n480:   }\\n481: \\n482:   return Http::FilterTrailersStatus::Continue;\\n483: }\\n484: \\n485: Http::Filter1xxHeadersStatus Filter::encode1xxHeaders(Http::ResponseHeaderMap&) {\\n486:   return Http::Filter1xxHeadersStatus::Continue;\\n487: }\\n488: \\n489: Http::FilterHeadersStatus Filter::encodeHeaders(Http::ResponseHeaderMap& headers, bool) {\\n490:   ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace,\\n491:                    \\\"ext_authz filter has {} response header(s) to add and {} response header(s) to \\\"\\n492:                    \\\"set to the encoded response:\\\",\\n493:                    *encoder_callbacks_, response_headers_to_add_.size(),\\n494:                    response_headers_to_set_.size());\\n495:   if (!response_headers_to_add_.empty()) {\\n496:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n497:         trace, \\\"ext_authz filter added header(s) to the encoded response:\\\", *encoder_callbacks_);\\n498:     for (const auto& [key, value] : response_headers_to_add_) {\\n499:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *encoder_callbacks_, key.get(), value);\\n500:       headers.addCopy(key, value);\\n501:       if (config_->enforceResponseHeaderLimits() && !headersWithinLimits(headers)) {\\n502:         responseHeaderLimitsReached();\\n503:         return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::StopIteration;\\n504:       }\\n505:     }\\n506:   }\\n507: \\n508:   if (!response_headers_to_set_.empty()) {\\n509:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n510:         trace, \\\"ext_authz filter set header(s) to the encoded response:\\\", *encoder_callbacks_);\\n511:     for (const auto& [key, value] : response_headers_to_set_) {\\n512:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *encoder_callbacks_, key.get(), value);\\n513:       headers.setCopy(key, value);\\n514:       if (config_->enforceResponseHeaderLimits() && !headersWithinLimits(headers)) {\\n515:         responseHeaderLimitsReached();\\n516:         return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::StopIteration;\\n517:       }\\n518:     }\\n519:   }\\n520: \\n521:   if (!response_headers_to_add_if_absent_.empty()) {\\n522:     for (const auto& [key, value] : response_headers_to_add_if_absent_) {\\n523:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *encoder_callbacks_, key.get(), value);\\n524:       if (auto header_entry = headers.get(key); header_entry.empty()) {\\n525:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter added header(s) to the encoded response:\\\",\\n526:                          *encoder_callbacks_);\\n527:         headers.addCopy(key, value);\\n528:         if (config_->enforceResponseHeaderLimits() && !headersWithinLimits(headers)) {\\n529:           responseHeaderLimitsReached();\\n530:           return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::StopIteration;\\n531:         }\\n532:       }\\n533:     }\\n534:   }\\n535: \\n536:   if (!response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists_.empty()) {\\n537:     for (const auto& [key, value] : response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists_) {\\n538:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *encoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n539:       if (auto header_entry = headers.get(key); !header_entry.empty()) {\\n540:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n541:             trace, \\\"ext_authz filter set header(s) to the encoded response:\\\", *encoder_callbacks_);\\n542:         headers.setCopy(key, value);\\n543:         if (config_->enforceResponseHeaderLimits() && !headersWithinLimits(headers)) {\\n544:           responseHeaderLimitsReached();\\n545:           return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::StopIteration;\\n546:         }\\n547:       }\\n548:     }\\n549:   }\\n550: \\n551:   return Http::FilterHeadersStatus::Continue;\\n552: }\\n553: \\n554: Http::FilterDataStatus Filter::encodeData(Buffer::Instance&, bool) {\\n555:   return Http::FilterDataStatus::Continue;\\n556: }\\n557: \\n558: Http::FilterTrailersStatus Filter::encodeTrailers(Http::ResponseTrailerMap&) {\\n559:   return Http::FilterTrailersStatus::Continue;\\n560: }\\n561: \\n562: Http::FilterMetadataStatus Filter::encodeMetadata(Http::MetadataMap&) {\\n563:   return Http::FilterMetadataStatus::Continue;\\n564: }\\n565: \\n566: void Filter::setDecoderFilterCallbacks(Http::StreamDecoderFilterCallbacks& callbacks) {\\n567:   decoder_callbacks_ = &callbacks;\\n568: }\\n569: \\n570: void Filter::updateLoggingInfo(const absl::optional<Grpc::Status::GrpcStatus>& grpc_status) {\\n571:   if (!config_->emitFilterStateStats()) {\\n572:     return;\\n573:   }\\n574: \\n575:   if (logging_info_ == nullptr) {\\n576:     return;\\n577:   }\\n578: \\n579:   if (grpc_status.has_value()) {\\n580:     logging_info_->setGrpcStatus(grpc_status.value());\\n581:   }\\n582: \\n583:   // Latency is the only stat available if we aren't using envoy grpc.\\n584:   if (start_time_.has_value()) {\\n585:     logging_info_->setLatency(std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::microseconds>(\\n586:         decoder_callbacks_->dispatcher().timeSource().monotonicTime() - start_time_.value()));\\n587:   }\\n588: \\n589:   auto const* stream_info = client_->streamInfo();\\n590:   if (stream_info == nullptr) {\\n591:     return;\\n592:   }\\n593: \\n594:   const auto& bytes_meter = stream_info->getUpstreamBytesMeter();\\n595:   if (bytes_meter != nullptr) {\\n596:     logging_info_->setBytesSent(bytes_meter->wireBytesSent());\\n597:     logging_info_->setBytesReceived(bytes_meter->wireBytesReceived());\\n598:   }\\n599:   if (stream_info->upstreamInfo().has_value()) {\\n600:     logging_info_->setUpstreamHost(stream_info->upstreamInfo()->upstreamHost());\\n601:   }\\n602:   absl::optional<Upstream::ClusterInfoConstSharedPtr> cluster_info =\\n603:       stream_info->upstreamClusterInfo();\\n604:   if (cluster_info) {\\n605:     logging_info_->setClusterInfo(std::move(*cluster_info));\\n606:   }\\n607: }\\n608: \\n609: void Filter::setEncoderFilterCallbacks(Http::StreamEncoderFilterCallbacks& callbacks) {\\n610:   encoder_callbacks_ = &callbacks;\\n611: }\\n612: \\n613: void Filter::onDestroy() {\\n614:   if (state_ == State::Calling) {\\n615:     state_ = State::Complete;\\n616:     client_->cancel();\\n617:   }\\n618: }\\n619: \\n620: CheckResult Filter::validateAndCheckDecoderHeaderMutation(\\n621:     Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckOperation operation, absl::string_view key,\\n622:     absl::string_view value) const {\\n623:   if (config_->validateMutations() && (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n624:                                        !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value))) {\\n625:     return CheckResult::FAIL;\\n626:   }\\n627:   // Check header mutation is valid according to configured decoder mutation rules.\\n628:   return config_->checkDecoderHeaderMutation(operation, Http::LowerCaseString(key), value);\\n629: }\\n630: \\n631: void Filter::onComplete(Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr&& response) {\\n632:   state_ = State::Complete;\\n633:   using Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus;\\n634:   Stats::StatName empty_stat_name;\\n635: \\n636:   updateLoggingInfo(response->grpc_status);\\n637: \\n638:   if (response->saw_invalid_append_actions) {\\n639:     if (config_->validateMutations()) {\\n640:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejecting response with invalid header append action.\\\",\\n641:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n642:       rejectResponse();\\n643:       return;\\n644:     }\\n645:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Ignoring response headers with invalid header append action.\\\",\\n646:                      *decoder_callbacks_);\\n647:   }\\n648: \\n649:   if (!response->dynamic_metadata.fields().empty()) {\\n650:     if (!config_->enableDynamicMetadataIngestion()) {\\n651:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace,\\n652:                        \\\"Response is trying to inject dynamic metadata, but dynamic metadata \\\"\\n653:                        \\\"ingestion is disabled. Ignoring...\\\",\\n654:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n655:       stats_.ignored_dynamic_metadata_.inc();\\n656:     } else {\\n657:       // Add duration of call to dynamic metadata if applicable\\n658:       if (start_time_.has_value() && response->status == CheckStatus::OK) {\\n659:         Protobuf::Value ext_authz_duration_value;\\n660:         auto duration =\\n661:             decoder_callbacks_->dispatcher().timeSource().monotonicTime() - start_time_.value();\\n662:         ext_authz_duration_value.set_number_value(\\n663:             std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::milliseconds>(duration).count());\\n664:         (*response->dynamic_metadata.mutable_fields())[\\\"ext_authz_duration\\\"] =\\n665:             ext_authz_duration_value;\\n666:       }\\n667:       decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().setDynamicMetadata(\\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\",\\n668:                                                           response->dynamic_metadata);\\n669:     }\\n670:   }\\n671: \\n672:   switch (response->status) {\\n673:   case CheckStatus::OK: {\\n674:     // Any changes to request headers or query parameters can affect how the request is going to be\\n675:     // routed. If we are changing the headers we also need to clear the route\\n676:     // cache.\\n677:     if (config_->clearRouteCache() &&\\n678:         (!response->headers_to_set.empty() || !response->headers_to_append.empty() ||\\n679:          !response->headers_to_remove.empty() || !response->query_parameters_to_set.empty() ||\\n680:          !response->query_parameters_to_remove.empty())) {\\n681:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(debug, \\\"ext_authz is clearing route cache\\\", *decoder_callbacks_);\\n682:       decoder_callbacks_->downstreamCallbacks()->clearRouteCache();\\n683:     }\\n684: \\n685:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace,\\n686:                      \\\"ext_authz filter added header(s) to the request:\\\", *decoder_callbacks_);\\n687:     for (const auto& [key, value] : response->headers_to_set) {\\n688:       CheckResult check_result = validateAndCheckDecoderHeaderMutation(\\n689:           Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckOperation::SET, key, value);\\n690:       switch (check_result) {\\n691:       case CheckResult::OK:\\n692:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n693:         request_headers_->setCopy(Http::LowerCaseString(key), value);\\n694:         if (!headersWithinLimits(*request_headers_)) {\\n695:           stats_.request_header_limits_reached_.inc();\\n696:           rejectResponse();\\n697:           return;\\n698:         }\\n699:         break;\\n700:       case CheckResult::IGNORE:\\n701:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Ignoring invalid header to set '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n702:                          key, value);\\n703:         break;\\n704:       case CheckResult::FAIL:\\n705:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejecting invalid header to set '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n706:                          key, value);\\n707:         rejectResponse();\\n708:         return;\\n709:       }\\n710:     }\\n711:     for (const auto& [key, value] : response->headers_to_add) {\\n712:       CheckResult check_result = validateAndCheckDecoderHeaderMutation(\\n713:           Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckOperation::SET, key, value);\\n714:       switch (check_result) {\\n715:       case CheckResult::OK:\\n716:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n717:         request_headers_->addCopy(Http::LowerCaseString(key), value);\\n718:         if (!headersWithinLimits(*request_headers_)) {\\n719:           stats_.request_header_limits_reached_.inc();\\n720:           rejectResponse();\\n721:           return;\\n722:         }\\n723:         break;\\n724:       case CheckResult::IGNORE:\\n725:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Ignoring invalid header to add '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n726:                          key, value);\\n727:         break;\\n728:       case CheckResult::FAIL:\\n729:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejecting invalid header to add '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n730:                          key, value);\\n731:         rejectResponse();\\n732:         return;\\n733:       }\\n734:     }\\n735:     for (const auto& [key, value] : response->headers_to_append) {\\n736:       CheckResult check_result = validateAndCheckDecoderHeaderMutation(\\n737:           Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckOperation::APPEND, key, value);\\n738:       switch (check_result) {\\n739:       case CheckResult::OK: {\\n740:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n741:         Http::LowerCaseString lowercase_key(key);\\n742:         const auto header_to_modify = request_headers_->get(lowercase_key);\\n743:         // TODO(dio): Add a flag to allow appending non-existent headers, without setting it\\n744:         // first (via `headers_to_add`). For example, given:\\n745:         // 1. Original headers {\\\"original\\\": \\\"true\\\"}\\n746:         // 2. Response headers from the authorization servers {{\\\"append\\\": \\\"1\\\"}, {\\\"append\\\":\\n747:         // \\\"2\\\"}}\\n748:         //\\n749:         // Currently it is not possible to add {{\\\"append\\\": \\\"1\\\"}, {\\\"append\\\": \\\"2\\\"}} (the\\n750:         // intended combined headers: {{\\\"original\\\": \\\"true\\\"}, {\\\"append\\\": \\\"1\\\"}, {\\\"append\\\":\\n751:         // \\\"2\\\"}}) to the request to upstream server by only sets `headers_to_append`.\\n752:         if (!header_to_modify.empty()) {\\n753:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}':'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n754:           // The current behavior of appending is by combining entries with the same key,\\n755:           // into one entry. The value of that combined entry is separated by \\\",\\\".\\n756:           // TODO(dio): Consider to use addCopy instead.\\n757:           request_headers_->appendCopy(lowercase_key, value);\\n758:           if (!headersWithinLimits(*request_headers_)) {\\n759:             stats_.request_header_limits_reached_.inc();\\n760:             rejectResponse();\\n761:             return;\\n762:           }\\n763:         }\\n764:         break;\\n765:       }\\n766:       case CheckResult::IGNORE:\\n767:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Ignoring invalid header to append '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n768:                          key, value);\\n769:         break;\\n770:       case CheckResult::FAIL:\\n771:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejecting invalid header to append '{}':'{}'.\\\",\\n772:                          *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n773:         rejectResponse();\\n774:         return;\\n775:       }\\n776:     }\\n777: \\n778:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace,\\n779:                      \\\"ext_authz filter removed header(s) from the request:\\\", *decoder_callbacks_);\\n780:     for (const auto& key : response->headers_to_remove) {\\n781:       // If the response contains an invalid header to remove, it's the same as trying to remove a\\n782:       // header that doesn't exist, so just ignore it.\\n783:       if (config_->validateMutations() && !Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key)) {\\n784:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Ignoring invalid header removal '{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key);\\n785:         continue;\\n786:       }\\n787:       // We don't allow removing any :-prefixed headers, nor Host, as removing them would make the\\n788:       // request malformed. checkDecoderHeaderMutation also performs this check, however, so only\\n789:       // perform this check explicitly if decoder header mutation rules is empty.\\n790:       if (!config_->hasDecoderHeaderMutationRules() &&\\n791:           !Http::HeaderUtility::isRemovableHeader(key)) {\\n792:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Ignoring invalid header removal '{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key);\\n793:         continue;\\n794:       }\\n795:       // Check header mutation is valid according to configured decoder header mutation rules.\\n796:       Http::LowerCaseString lowercase_key(key);\\n797:       switch (config_->checkDecoderHeaderMutation(CheckOperation::REMOVE, lowercase_key,\\n798:                                                   EMPTY_STRING)) {\\n799:       case CheckResult::OK:\\n800:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key);\\n801:         request_headers_->remove(lowercase_key);\\n802:         if (!headersWithinLimits(*request_headers_)) {\\n803:           stats_.request_header_limits_reached_.inc();\\n804:           rejectResponse();\\n805:           return;\\n806:         }\\n807:         break;\\n808:       case CheckResult::IGNORE:\\n809:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Ignoring disallowed header removal '{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n810:                          key);\\n811:         break;\\n812:       case CheckResult::FAIL:\\n813:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejecting disallowed header removal '{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n814:                          key);\\n815:         rejectResponse();\\n816:         return;\\n817:       }\\n818:     }\\n819: \\n820:     if (!response->response_headers_to_add.empty()) {\\n821:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter saving {} header(s) to add to the response:\\\",\\n822:                        *decoder_callbacks_, response->response_headers_to_add.size());\\n823:       for (const auto& [key, value] : response->response_headers_to_add) {\\n824:         if (config_->validateMutations() && (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n825:                                              !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value))) {\\n826:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid header '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key,\\n827:                            value);\\n828:           rejectResponse();\\n829:           return;\\n830:         }\\n831:       }\\n832:       response_headers_to_add_ = Http::HeaderVector{response->response_headers_to_add.begin(),\\n833:                                                     response->response_headers_to_add.end()};\\n834:     }\\n835: \\n836:     if (!response->response_headers_to_set.empty()) {\\n837:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter saving {} header(s) to set to the response:\\\",\\n838:                        *decoder_callbacks_, response->response_headers_to_set.size());\\n839:       for (const auto& [key, value] : response->response_headers_to_set) {\\n840:         if (config_->validateMutations() && (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n841:                                              !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value))) {\\n842:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid header '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key,\\n843:                            value);\\n844:           rejectResponse();\\n845:           return;\\n846:         }\\n847:       }\\n848:       response_headers_to_set_ = Http::HeaderVector{response->response_headers_to_set.begin(),\\n849:                                                     response->response_headers_to_set.end()};\\n850:     }\\n851: \\n852:     if (!response->response_headers_to_add_if_absent.empty()) {\\n853:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter saving {} header(s) to add to the response:\\\",\\n854:                        *decoder_callbacks_, response->response_headers_to_add_if_absent.size());\\n855:       for (const auto& [key, value] : response->response_headers_to_add_if_absent) {\\n856:         if (config_->validateMutations() && (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n857:                                              !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value))) {\\n858:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid header '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key,\\n859:                            value);\\n860:           rejectResponse();\\n861:           return;\\n862:         }\\n863:       }\\n864:       response_headers_to_add_if_absent_ =\\n865:           Http::HeaderVector{response->response_headers_to_add_if_absent.begin(),\\n866:                              response->response_headers_to_add_if_absent.end()};\\n867:     }\\n868: \\n869:     if (!response->response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists.empty()) {\\n870:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter saving {} header(s) to set to the response:\\\",\\n871:                        *decoder_callbacks_,\\n872:                        response->response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists.size());\\n873:       for (const auto& [key, value] : response->response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists) {\\n874:         if (config_->validateMutations() && (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n875:                                              !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value))) {\\n876:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid header '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key,\\n877:                            value);\\n878:           rejectResponse();\\n879:           return;\\n880:         }\\n881:       }\\n882:       response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists_ =\\n883:           Http::HeaderVector{response->response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists.begin(),\\n884:                              response->response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists.end()};\\n885:     }\\n886: \\n887:     absl::optional<Http::Utility::QueryParamsMulti> modified_query_parameters;\\n888:     if (!response->query_parameters_to_set.empty()) {\\n889:       modified_query_parameters = Http::Utility::QueryParamsMulti::parseQueryString(\\n890:           request_headers_->Path()->value().getStringView());\\n891:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n892:           trace, \\\"ext_authz filter set query parameter(s) on the request:\\\", *decoder_callbacks_);\\n893:       for (const auto& [key, value] : response->query_parameters_to_set) {\\n894:         if (config_->validateMutations() &&\\n895:             (!Http::Utility::PercentEncoding::queryParameterIsUrlEncoded(key) ||\\n896:              !Http::Utility::PercentEncoding::queryParameterIsUrlEncoded(value))) {\\n897:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid query parameter {}={}.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_,\\n898:                            key, value);\\n899:           rejectResponse();\\n900:           return;\\n901:         }\\n902:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}={}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n903:         modified_query_parameters->overwrite(key, value);\\n904:       }\\n905:     }\\n906: \\n907:     if (!response->query_parameters_to_remove.empty()) {\\n908:       if (!modified_query_parameters) {\\n909:         modified_query_parameters = Http::Utility::QueryParamsMulti::parseQueryString(\\n910:             request_headers_->Path()->value().getStringView());\\n911:       }\\n912:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter removed query parameter(s) from the request:\\\",\\n913:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n914:       for (const auto& key : response->query_parameters_to_remove) {\\n915:         ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key);\\n916:         modified_query_parameters->remove(key);\\n917:       }\\n918:     }\\n919: \\n920:     // We modified the query parameters in some way, so regenerate the `path` header and set it\\n921:     // here.\\n922:     if (modified_query_parameters) {\\n923:       const auto new_path =\\n924:           modified_query_parameters->replaceQueryString(request_headers_->Path()->value());\\n925:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n926:           trace, \\\"ext_authz filter modified query parameter(s), using new path for request: {}\\\",\\n927:           *decoder_callbacks_, new_path);\\n928:       request_headers_->setPath(new_path);\\n929:       if (!headersWithinLimits(*request_headers_)) {\\n930:         stats_.request_header_limits_reached_.inc();\\n931:         rejectResponse();\\n932:         return;\\n933:       }\\n934:     }\\n935: \\n936:     if (cluster_) {\\n937:       config_->incCounter(cluster_->statsScope(), config_->ext_authz_ok_);\\n938:     }\\n939:     stats_.ok_.inc();\\n940:     continueDecoding();\\n941:     break;\\n942:   }\\n943: \\n944:   case CheckStatus::Denied: {\\n945:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter rejected the request. Response status code: '{}'\\\",\\n946:                      *decoder_callbacks_, enumToInt(response->status_code));\\n947:     stats_.denied_.inc();\\n948: \\n949:     if (cluster_) {\\n950:       config_->incCounter(cluster_->statsScope(), config_->ext_authz_denied_);\\n951:       if (config_->chargeClusterResponseStats()) {\\n952:         Http::CodeStats::ResponseStatInfo info{config_->scope(),\\n953:                                                cluster_->statsScope(),\\n954:                                                empty_stat_name,\\n955:                                                enumToInt(response->status_code),\\n956:                                                true,\\n957:                                                empty_stat_name,\\n958:                                                empty_stat_name,\\n959:                                                empty_stat_name,\\n960:                                                empty_stat_name,\\n961:                                                empty_stat_name,\\n962:                                                false};\\n963:         config_->httpContext().codeStats().chargeResponseStat(info, false);\\n964:       }\\n965:     }\\n966: \\n967:     // Check headers are valid.\\n968:     if (config_->validateMutations()) {\\n969:       for (const auto& [key, value] : response->headers_to_set) {\\n970:         if (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n971:             !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value)) {\\n972:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid header '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key,\\n973:                            value);\\n974:           rejectResponse();\\n975:           return;\\n976:         }\\n977:       }\\n978:     }\\n979: \\n980:     if (config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes() > 0 &&\\n981:         response->body.length() > config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes()) {\\n982:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n983:           trace, \\\"ext_authz filter is truncating the response body from {} to {} bytes.\\\",\\n984:           *decoder_callbacks_, response->body.length(), config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes());\\n985:       response->body.resize(config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes());\\n986:     }\\n987: \\n988:     // setResponseFlag must be called before sendLocalReply\\n989:     decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().setResponseFlag(\\n990:         StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UnauthorizedExternalService);\\n991:     decoder_callbacks_->sendLocalReply(\\n992:         response->status_code, response->body,\\n993:         [&headers = response->headers_to_set, &callbacks = *decoder_callbacks_,\\n994:          this](Http::HeaderMap& response_headers) -> void {\\n995:           ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace,\\n996:                            \\\"ext_authz filter added header(s) to the local response:\\\", callbacks);\\n997:           // Firstly, remove all headers requested by the ext_authz filter, to ensure that they will\\n998:           // override existing headers.\\n999:           for (const auto& [key, _] : headers) {\\n1000:             response_headers.remove(Http::LowerCaseString(key));\\n1001:           }\\n1002:           // Then set all of the requested headers, allowing the same header to be set multiple\\n1003:           // times, e.g. `Set-Cookie`.\\n1004:           for (const auto& [key, value] : headers) {\\n1005:             if (config_->enforceResponseHeaderLimits() &&\\n1006:                 response_headers.size() >= response_headers.maxHeadersCount()) {\\n1007:               stats_.omitted_response_headers_.inc();\\n1008:               ENVOY_LOG_EVERY_POW_2(\\n1009:                   warn,\\n1010:                   \\\"Some ext_authz response headers weren't added because the header map was full.\\\");\\n1011:               break;\\n1012:             }\\n1013:             ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\" '{}':'{}'\\\", callbacks, key, value);\\n1014:             response_headers.addCopy(Http::LowerCaseString(key), value);\\n1015:           }\\n1016:         },\\n1017:         absl::nullopt, Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponseCodeDetails::get().AuthzDenied);\\n1018:     break;\\n1019:   }\\n1020: \\n1021:   case CheckStatus::Error: {\\n1022:     if (cluster_) {\\n1023:       config_->incCounter(cluster_->statsScope(), config_->ext_authz_error_);\\n1024:     }\\n1025:     stats_.error_.inc();\\n1026: \\n1027:     // Validate error response headers and clear custom attributes if invalid.\\n1028:     validateAndClearInvalidErrorResponseAttributes(response);\\n1029: \\n1030:     // Apply max_denied_response_body_bytes limit to error response body as well.\\n1031:     if (config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes() > 0 &&\\n1032:         response->body.length() > config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes()) {\\n1033:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n1034:           trace, \\\"ext_authz filter is truncating the error response body from {} to {} bytes.\\\",\\n1035:           *decoder_callbacks_, response->body.length(), config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes());\\n1036:       response->body.resize(config_->maxDeniedResponseBodyBytes());\\n1037:     }\\n1038: \\n1039:     if (config_->failureModeAllow()) {\\n1040:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter allowed the request with error\\\",\\n1041:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n1042:       stats_.failure_mode_allowed_.inc();\\n1043:       if (cluster_) {\\n1044:         config_->incCounter(cluster_->statsScope(), config_->ext_authz_failure_mode_allowed_);\\n1045:       }\\n1046:       if (config_->failureModeAllowHeaderAdd()) {\\n1047:         request_headers_->addReferenceKey(\\n1048:             Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Headers::get().EnvoyAuthFailureModeAllowed, \\\"true\\\");\\n1049:       }\\n1050:       continueDecoding();\\n1051:     } else {\\n1052:       // Use custom status code from error_response if provided, otherwise use status_on_error.\\n1053:       // Status code 0 means not set.\\n1054:       const Http::Code status_code = response->status_code != static_cast<Http::Code>(0)\\n1055:                                          ? response->status_code\\n1056:                                          : config_->statusOnError();\\n1057:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(\\n1058:           trace, \\\"ext_authz filter rejected the request with an error. Response status code: {}\\\",\\n1059:           *decoder_callbacks_, enumToInt(status_code));\\n1060:       decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().setResponseFlag(\\n1061:           StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UnauthorizedExternalService);\\n1062: \\n1063:       decoder_callbacks_->sendLocalReply(\\n1064:           status_code, response->body,\\n1065:           [&headers_to_set = response->headers_to_set,\\n1066:            &headers_to_append = response->headers_to_append,\\n1067:            this](Http::HeaderMap& response_headers) -> void {\\n1068:             addErrorResponseHeaders(response_headers, headers_to_set, headers_to_append);\\n1069:           },\\n1070:           absl::nullopt, Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponseCodeDetails::get().AuthzError);\\n1071:     }\\n1072:     break;\\n1073:   }\\n1074:   }\\n1075: }\\n1076: \\n1077: void Filter::responseHeaderLimitsReached() {\\n1078:   const Http::Code status = Http::Code::InternalServerError;\\n1079:   ENVOY_LOG_EVERY_POW_2(warn,\\n1080:                         \\\"ext_authz filter couldn't add all response header mutations. \\\"\\n1081:                         \\\"Sending local reply with response status code: {}\\\",\\n1082:                         enumToInt(status));\\n1083:   stats_.response_header_limits_reached_.inc();\\n1084:   encoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().setResponseFlag(\\n1085:       StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UnauthorizedExternalService);\\n1086:   encoder_callbacks_->sendLocalReply(\\n1087:       status, EMPTY_STRING, nullptr, absl::nullopt,\\n1088:       Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponseCodeDetails::get().AuthzInvalid);\\n1089: }\\n1090: \\n1091: void Filter::rejectResponse() {\\n1092:   const Http::Code status = Http::Code::InternalServerError;\\n1093:   ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"ext_authz filter invalidated the response. Response status code: {}\\\",\\n1094:                    *decoder_callbacks_, enumToInt(status));\\n1095:   if (cluster_) {\\n1096:     config_->incCounter(cluster_->statsScope(), config_->ext_authz_invalid_);\\n1097:   }\\n1098:   stats_.invalid_.inc();\\n1099:   decoder_callbacks_->streamInfo().setResponseFlag(\\n1100:       StreamInfo::CoreResponseFlag::UnauthorizedExternalService);\\n1101:   decoder_callbacks_->sendLocalReply(\\n1102:       status, EMPTY_STRING, nullptr, absl::nullopt,\\n1103:       Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponseCodeDetails::get().AuthzInvalid);\\n1104: }\\n1105: \\n1106: bool Filter::isBufferFull(uint64_t num_bytes_processing) const {\\n1107:   if (!allow_partial_message_) {\\n1108:     return false;\\n1109:   }\\n1110: \\n1111:   uint64_t num_bytes_buffered = num_bytes_processing;\\n1112:   const auto* buffer = decoder_callbacks_->decodingBuffer();\\n1113:   if (buffer != nullptr) {\\n1114:     num_bytes_buffered += buffer->length();\\n1115:   }\\n1116: \\n1117:   return num_bytes_buffered >= max_request_bytes_;\\n1118: }\\n1119: \\n1120: void Filter::continueDecoding() {\\n1121:   // After sending the check request, we don't need to buffer the data anymore.\\n1122:   buffer_data_ = false;\\n1123: \\n1124:   filter_return_ = FilterReturn::ContinueDecoding;\\n1125:   if (!initiating_call_) {\\n1126:     decoder_callbacks_->continueDecoding();\\n1127:   }\\n1128: }\\n1129: \\n1130: Filter::PerRouteFlags Filter::getPerRouteFlags(const Router::RouteConstSharedPtr& route) const {\\n1131:   if (route == nullptr) {\\n1132:     return PerRouteFlags{true /*skip_check_*/, defaultCheckSettings()};\\n1133:   }\\n1134: \\n1135:   const auto* specific_check_settings =\\n1136:       Http::Utility::resolveMostSpecificPerFilterConfig<FilterConfigPerRoute>(decoder_callbacks_);\\n1137:   if (specific_check_settings != nullptr) {\\n1138:     return PerRouteFlags{specific_check_settings->disabled(),\\n1139:                          specific_check_settings->checkSettings()};\\n1140:   }\\n1141: \\n1142:   return PerRouteFlags{false /*skip_check_*/, defaultCheckSettings()};\\n1143: }\\n1144: \\n1145: bool Filter::validateAndClearInvalidErrorResponseAttributes(\\n1146:     Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr& response) {\\n1147:   if (!config_->validateMutations()) {\\n1148:     return true;\\n1149:   }\\n1150: \\n1151:   // Validate headers_to_set.\\n1152:   for (const auto& [key, value] : response->headers_to_set) {\\n1153:     if (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n1154:         !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value)) {\\n1155:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid error header '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key,\\n1156:                        value);\\n1157:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(info,\\n1158:                        \\\"Custom error response from ext_authz will be ignored due to invalid \\\"\\n1159:                        \\\"header. Falling back to generic error response.\\\",\\n1160:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n1161:       // Fall back to generic error by clearing all custom attributes.\\n1162:       response->headers_to_set.clear();\\n1163:       response->headers_to_append.clear();\\n1164:       response->body.clear();\\n1165:       response->status_code = static_cast<Http::Code>(0); // Clear custom status.\\n1166:       return false;\\n1167:     }\\n1168:   }\\n1169: \\n1170:   // Validate headers_to_append.\\n1171:   for (const auto& [key, value] : response->headers_to_append) {\\n1172:     if (!Http::HeaderUtility::headerNameIsValid(key) ||\\n1173:         !Http::HeaderUtility::headerValueIsValid(value)) {\\n1174:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\"Rejected invalid error header '{}':'{}'.\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key,\\n1175:                        value);\\n1176:       ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(info,\\n1177:                        \\\"Custom error response from ext_authz will be ignored due to invalid \\\"\\n1178:                        \\\"header. Falling back to generic error response.\\\",\\n1179:                        *decoder_callbacks_);\\n1180:       // Fall back to generic error by clearing all custom attributes.\\n1181:       response->headers_to_set.clear();\\n1182:       response->headers_to_append.clear();\\n1183:       response->body.clear();\\n1184:       response->status_code = static_cast<Http::Code>(0); // Clear custom status.\\n1185:       return false;\\n1186:     }\\n1187:   }\\n1188: \\n1189:   return true;\\n1190: }\\n1191: \\n1192: bool Filter::canAddResponseHeader(Http::HeaderMap& response_headers) {\\n1193:   if (config_->enforceResponseHeaderLimits() &&\\n1194:       response_headers.size() >= response_headers.maxHeadersCount()) {\\n1195:     stats_.omitted_response_headers_.inc();\\n1196:     ENVOY_LOG_EVERY_POW_2(warn, \\\"Some ext_authz error response headers weren't added because the \\\"\\n1197:                                 \\\"header map was full.\\\");\\n1198:     return false;\\n1199:   }\\n1200:   return true;\\n1201: }\\n1202: \\n1203: void Filter::addErrorResponseHeaders(\\n1204:     Http::HeaderMap& response_headers,\\n1205:     const std::vector<std::pair<std::string, std::string>>& headers_to_set,\\n1206:     const std::vector<std::pair<std::string, std::string>>& headers_to_append) {\\n1207:   ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace,\\n1208:                    \\\"ext_authz filter added header(s) to the error response:\\\", *decoder_callbacks_);\\n1209: \\n1210:   // First, handle headers_to_set which should override existing headers.\\n1211:   for (const auto& [key, _] : headers_to_set) {\\n1212:     response_headers.remove(Http::LowerCaseString(key));\\n1213:   }\\n1214:   for (const auto& [key, value] : headers_to_set) {\\n1215:     if (!canAddResponseHeader(response_headers)) {\\n1216:       break;\\n1217:     }\\n1218:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\" '{}':'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n1219:     response_headers.addCopy(Http::LowerCaseString(key), value);\\n1220:   }\\n1221: \\n1222:   // Then, handle headers_to_append which should append to existing headers.\\n1223:   for (const auto& [key, value] : headers_to_append) {\\n1224:     if (!canAddResponseHeader(response_headers)) {\\n1225:       break;\\n1226:     }\\n1227:     ENVOY_STREAM_LOG(trace, \\\" '{}':'{}'\\\", *decoder_callbacks_, key, value);\\n1228:     response_headers.addCopy(Http::LowerCaseString(key), value);\\n1229:   }\\n1230: }\\n1231: \\n1232: } // namespace ExtAuthz\\n1233: } // namespace HttpFilters\\n1234: } // namespace Extensions\\n1235: } // namespace Envoy\\n1236:
